category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Pympress as a PDF presentation tool for dual-screen setups.
source_facts.description says it is a dual-screen PDF reader designed for presentations.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and documentation use the display name Pympress.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says generated docs are hosted on the GitHub Pages site for the repo.
repo_sources: Official Pympress documentation and README identify Cimbali/pympress as the repository.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official README describes dual-screen presenter features and GTK-based desktop use.
